title: Fix virtual interface function calls binding to wrong instance

features.name: virtual interface calling interface function with state change
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declared in a class calling an interface function that modifies internal interface state

features.name: multiple interface instances with unused instance
features.description: Code should include two instances of the same interface where one instance is unused, triggering user2p overwriting bug

features.name: virtual interface assignment from module
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface variable in a class being assigned from a module-level interface instance
